title: service-accounts — feature keys
description: Service accounts contribute NO tenant-facing UI features — the tenant surface never sees SA rows. The feature keys below are consumed by the platform-admin SDUI + by observability tooling to decide whether the SA machinery is available in the current environment.

features.description: Base SA capability. Always on when the module is booted. Presence of this feature key indicates the SA substrate is reachable + operational.
SAs bound to a specific tenant. Baseline across every plan tier.
SAs without tenant scope (cross-tenant integrations). Team+ tier.
Per-SA IP allowlist stored in metadata. Enterprise-only. Refuses requests from non-allowlisted source IPs at runtime.
Ability to request JWT TTLs beyond the module-default max (3600s). Enterprise-only.
Weekly detection of SAs unused for > 30 days. Team+ tier.
